title: Warhead countermeasure
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Warhead countermeasures''' were self-defense mechanisms employed on various small [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] such as [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and [[Light freighter/Legends|light]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], designed to protect the ship against incoming [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]]. They came in at least three varieties: [[antimissile missile]]s, [[Chaff/Legends|chaff]], and [[Flare/Legends|flares]].

==Behind the scenes==
Countermeasures were introduced in the game ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' as a means of protecting one's ship from enemy warheads, but went about this function in very different ways, each with its own distinct advantages and disadvantages. However, they appear more than anything else to be a game mechanic, and are not mentioned in any other source, apart from fleetingly in ''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''. This does not rule out the possibility that were a standard armament on most small ships, as ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' suggests; however, they are merely not mentioned.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{Mo}}
